entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Global environmental shift causing unpredictable weather patterns and affecting agriculture

entities.name: BURGEONING POPULATION
entities.description: Rapid increase in human population increasing food demand

entities.name: COVID-19
entities.description: Viral outbreak that disrupted global food production systems

entities.name: FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing agricultural crops for human consumption

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions with vulnerable populations and lower economic development

entities.name: DIVERSIFICATION OF CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The strategy of increasing the variety of crops grown to improve food security and sustainability

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A major cereal crop providing a significant portion of plant-based protein

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A major cereal crop providing a significant portion of plant-based protein

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A major cereal crop providing a significant portion of plant-based protein

entities.name: MILLETS
entities.description: Ancient, versatile orphan crops known for resilience and high nutritional value

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Underutilized crops that are often neglected by farmers and researchers

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: A group of grass crops including major and underutilized species

entities.name: FAST GROWING
entities.description: The ability of a crop to reach maturity quickly

entities.name: HIGH YIELDING
entities.description: The ability of a crop to produce a large amount of harvest per unit area

entities.name: WITHSTANDING HARSH ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: The capacity of a crop to survive and produce in extreme environmental conditions

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential minerals required by the body in small amounts

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A critical micronutrient found in millets

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A critical micronutrient found in millets

entities.name: AGRONOMIC SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability to maintain agricultural productivity without depleting natural resources

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species

entities.name: GENOMIC RESOURCES
entities.description: The collection of genomic data and tools available for a species

entities.name: NEXT-GENERATION OMICS
entities.description: Advanced biological analysis techniques used to study the genome, transcriptome, and proteome

entities.name: STRESS CONDITIONS
entities.description: Adverse environmental factors that negatively impact crop growth

entities.name: INTEGRATIVE OMICS TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Combined omics approaches used to identify desirable phenotypes

entities.name: PHENOTYPES
entities.description: The observable physical properties of an organism

entities.name: AGRONOMIC VALUE
entities.description: The economic or agricultural worth of a crop's characteristics

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGICAL INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: The application of biotechnology to improve crop breeding and productivity

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION
entities.description: A method used to associate genetic variants with specific traits

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method that uses genomic markers to predict the breeding value of individuals

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: A technique for making precise changes to the DNA sequence of an organism

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE/MACHINE LEARNING
entities.description: Computational techniques used to analyze data and improve breeding efficiency
